description: hybrid v3 baseline (4 signals, 6 toggleable mechanisms, BTC/ETH/SOL 1h)

enable cooldown 2 bars — filters valid re-entries
enable MACD (5th signal) — equal score, MACD redundant with existing signals
enable BB compression (6th signal) — equal score, adds to both sides equally

enable dynamic threshold — filters too aggressively, lower return
RSI period 14->8 (Nunchi's best) — worse on our data, more trades but lower WR
RSI period 14->20 (slower RSI = better on 3 assets)
RSI period 20->24 (marginal improvement, fewer trades)
RSI period 24->30 (big improvement, 72 trades, lower DD)
RSI 30->40 — only 33 trades, trade_count_factor penalty
EMA 5/21->7/26 — equal score
EMA 5/21->3/15 — equal score, EMA irrelevant with RSI 30
vote threshold 3->2 — equal score
RSI exits 80/20->75/25 — more trades but lower Sharpe
RSI exits 80/20->85/15 — only 20 trades, trade count penalty
momentum 12/6->24/12 — equal score
WARMUP 120->30 — indicators not converged, bad early signals
long-only — shorts contribute value, -4.9% return
remove momentum signals, EMA+RSI only — simplification win, momentum redundant
pure RSI only (remove EMA) — simplification win, pure RSI strategy
RSI 30->35 (higher Sharpe, 44 trades)
RSI 35->40 — only 33 trades, too few
RSI 35->32 (better balance: 63 trades, higher score)
RSI exits 78/22 — more trades but lower Sharpe
RSI exits 82/18 — only 39 trades
RSI entry 55/45 — marginally worse
RSI momentum (above 50 AND rising) — too restrictive
mean-reversion RSI (buy <30, sell >70) — wrong regime, only 17 trades
WARMUP 120->60 — RSI(32) needs more warmup
add EMA back (threshold 2) — equal score, RSI dominates
RSI 33 — marginally worse than 32
RSI 31 — worse than 32
time-based exit 120 bars — cuts winners short
dual RSI (slow entry, fast exit) — fast exits cut winners
pure EMA(50/200) crossover — low Sharpe, 37 trades
asymmetric exits 77/18 — 39 trades
add 4% profit target exit (locks gains, more trades)
widen RSI exits to 85/15 with 4% PT
add RSI reversal exit at 77/23 (catches momentum shifts)
